_comment: Single source of truth mapping a framework model-tier label (the Claude Code model aliases used in agent frontmatter) to the concrete model each harness runs. Every harness adapter reads this one file: the Codex adapter uses the 'codex' column; pi/opencode adapters add their own column (e.g. 'pi', 'opencode') here rather than hardcoding a second mapping. Per AgDR-0087 (reasoning agents require a frontier-tier model), keep each harness's 'opus' row on that harness's strongest available model — never downgrade the reasoning tier when adding a harness. Absent tier or column falls back to the label unchanged.
